name: pi-odoo-workflow
description_en: Odoo 18/19 module development for pi and Claude Code — auto-detects your modules, finds XML IDs, and scaffolds models, views, wizards, reports, controllers, OWL components, tests and migrations with 15 /odoo-* slash commands. Includes TypeScript extension
description_zh: Odoo 18/19 模块开发工具，适用于 pi 和 Claude Code — 自动检测模块、查找 XML ID，并使用 15 个 /odoo-* 斜杠命令为模型、视图、向导、报表、控制器、OWL 组件、测试和迁移生成脚手架。包含 TypeScript 扩展
